title: DB connection pool exhausted — payments-service
error_message: FATAL: remaining connection slots are reserved for non-replication superuser connections
stack_trace:
PostgreSQLException: FATAL: remaining connection slots are reserved
  at ConnectionPool.acquire (pool.js:142)
  at PaymentProcessor.charge (processor.js:88)
  at POST /api/v2/payments (routes.js:34)
known_fix: Increase max_connections in postgresql.conf or reduce pool size in app config. Restart connection pool manager.

title: Memory leak detected — recommendation-engine
error_message: OOMKilled: Container exceeded memory limit of 2Gi
stack_trace:
OOMKilled at runtime
  RSS: 2.1GB, Heap: 1.8GB
  at RecommendationWorker.process (worker.py:221)
  at asyncio.Task._step (tasks.py:232)
known_fix: Restart the pod to release memory. Root cause is unbounded LRU cache in recommendation-engine v2.3.1 — patch available in v2.3.2.

title: Failed deployment rollout — auth-service
error_message: ImagePullBackOff: failed to pull image gcr.io/prod/auth-service:v4.1.0
stack_trace:
Warning  Failed     kubelet  Failed to pull image: rpc error: code = Unknown
desc = failed to pull and unpack image: failed to resolve reference
  at k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/images (image_manager.go:553)
known_fix: Image tag v4.1.0 was not pushed to registry. Revert deployment to v4.0.9 via: kubectl rollout undo deployment/auth-service

title: API rate limit breach — stripe-integration
error_message: StripeRateLimitError: Too many requests made to the API too quickly
stack_trace:
StripeRateLimitError: Too many requests
  at stripe.charges.create (stripe.js:102)
  at BillingService.processInvoices (billing.js:67)
  at CronJob.run (scheduler.js:88)
known_fix: Implement exponential backoff in stripe client. Add request queue with 100 req/sec cap. Batch invoice processing to off-peak hours.

title: Pod crashloop — order-processor
stack_trace:
Error: Cannot find module './config/database'
  at Function.Module._resolveFilename (internal/modules/cjs/loader.js:880)
  at process.nextTick (internal/process/next_tick.js:22)
Exiting with code 1
known_fix: Missing DATABASE_CONFIG env var in new deployment. Add DATABASE_CONFIG secret to k8s deployment manifest and redeploy.

title: Replica lag critical — analytics-db
stack_trace:
PostgreSQL replication monitor alert
  Primary LSN: 0/B2F3A88
  Replica LSN: 0/A1C2D44
  Lag bytes: 286,532,416
  Alert threshold: 300 seconds
known_fix: Check replica disk I/O — likely throttled. Increase iops on replica EBS volume or pause non-critical analytics queries to let replica catch up.

title: SSL certificate expired — api-gateway
stack_trace:
SSL handshake failed: certificate has expired
  NotAfter: Jun 28 00:00:00 2026 GMT
  at tls.TLSSocket._finishInit (tls.js:641)
  at TLSWrap.ssl.onhandshakedone (tls.js:466)
known_fix: Renew certificate via certbot: certbot renew --force-renewal. Restart nginx. Add auto-renewal cron job to prevent recurrence.

title: Disk full — log aggregator node
error_message: No space left on device: /var/log partition at 100%
stack_trace:
OSError: [Errno 28] No space left on device: '/var/log/app/combined.log'
  at LogWriter.flush (writer.py:144)
  at asyncio.Task._step (tasks.py:232)
known_fix: Run log rotation immediately: logrotate -f /etc/logrotate.d/app. Delete logs older than 7 days. Expand /var/log partition or add log shipping to S3.

title: Upstream timeout cascade — search-service
error_message: Elasticsearch timeout: no response from cluster in 30000ms
stack_trace:
ConnectionTimeout: Request timed out
  at Transport.request (transport.js:387)
  at Client.search (client.js:234)
  at SearchService.query (search.js:78)
known_fix: Elasticsearch cluster has split-brain issue. Force master election: POST /_cluster/voting_config_exclusions. Scale down and up data nodes one by one.

title: Heap dump spike — session-manager
error_message: Java heap space: GC overhead limit exceeded
stack_trace:
java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded
  at java.util.HashMap.resize(HashMap.java:704)
  at com.app.sessions.SessionCache.put(SessionCache.java:88)
  at com.app.auth.AuthFilter.doFilter(AuthFilter.java:52)
known_fix: Increase JVM heap: -Xmx4g. SessionCache has unbounded growth — add TTL of 30 minutes. Restart service after config change.

title: DB connection pool exhausted — inventory-service
error_message: HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available, request timed out after 30000ms
known_fix: Same pattern as payments-service pool exhaustion. Increase hikari pool size or reduce query hold time. Check for unclosed connections in transaction blocks.

title: Node not ready — worker-cluster
error_message: Node worker-node-07 status: NotReady for 8 minutes
stack_trace:
Event: NodeNotReady
  Reason: KubeletNotReady
  Message: container runtime network not ready: NetworkReady=false
  reason: NetworkPlugin cni is not initialized
known_fix: CNI plugin failed after kernel update. Drain node, delete and recreate it. Or restart kubelet: systemctl restart kubelet on the affected node.

title: Env var missing post-deploy — notification-service
error_message: KeyError: 'SENDGRID_API_KEY' — service started without required config
stack_trace:
KeyError: 'SENDGRID_API_KEY'
  at EmailClient.__init__(client.py:22)
  at NotificationService.startup(service.py:45)
  at uvicorn.main:main
known_fix: SENDGRID_API_KEY not set in new k8s secret. Add to secrets manifest and rolling restart. Same pattern as order-processor missing DATABASE_CONFIG.

title: Rate limit on GitHub API — CI pipeline
error_message: API rate limit exceeded for token: 60 requests/hour reached
known_fix: Rotate to a different GitHub PAT with fresh quota. Long term: cache PR metadata to avoid repeat API calls per pipeline run.

title: Slow query lock — reporting-db
error_message: Lock wait timeout exceeded; try restarting transaction
stack_trace:
MySQLdb.OperationalError: (1205, 'Lock wait timeout exceeded')
  at ReportGenerator.buildMonthly(generator.py:334)
  at CeleryTask.run(tasks.py:67)
known_fix: Long-running monthly report query is blocking OLTP writes. Kill the query: KILL QUERY [pid]. Schedule heavy reports to off-peak window (2-4am).
